response.justification: Candidate is massively overqualified for a junior/mid-level role — a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level position raises serious flags about fit, retention, and salary alignment. Technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, Postgres-adjacent SQL, Docker, AWS) clearly exceed requirements, but the seniority mismatch is the dominant concern. Worth a screening call only to understand motivation (relocation, on-site preference, career change), otherwise likely to leave quickly or be misaligned on comp.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience far exceeding required level
Proven architecture skills across web, microservices, and cloud (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Berlin-based, matches on-site requirement; bonus AI/LLM and MCP tooling experience
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior engineer applying for junior/mid role suggests poor fit or short tenure risk
Only basic German in a renewable energy/construction domain likely requiring local stakeholder communication
No demonstrated domain experience in renewable energy, construction tech, or energy consulting workflows
